original text:
Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) has been decimated by the reality that the PC market is shrinking, and while it has made a wonderful move to the Cloud to recapture that lost revenue, now fears surround its ability to deliver the goods with Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) on its heels.
The fear hit a fever pitch just a few month ago when reports came out that Intel was finding its 10nm process node shrink neither easy nor cheap. But now the narrative is gently changing -- we said gently. Perhaps Intel isn't going to be as far behind as expected in the 7nm market, and perhaps buyers will have more patience.
This earnings release will focus on the numbers, as they always do, but the guidance will be the focus. Intel must answer questions about its lag in the 7nm market and when it will be back, if ever, as the technology leader in the space.
Some questions will persist around its GPU product, but for now, that market is so utterly dominated by Nvidia, it's likely a non starter, even if its good news -- in fact, even it's bad news.
One note, Intel's estimates from analysts are so tight, that a guidance number could surprise the market without that much of an upside forecast.
Lastly, Intel is a bellwether, and in that vein, all bulls of this market want to hear about growing demand from the guts of technology -- that's memory and CPUs.
Finally, when we get down to the valuations metrics, we can see, Intel is still forecast to grow, and that leaves its forward fiscal year 2020 PE ratio at about 10.
* If INTC	reports a revenue number above $	18.4 Billion	, that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC	reports an EPS number above $	1.18	, that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC	guides revenue above $	18.96 Billion	, that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC	guides EPS above $	1.19	, that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC	hits the mean estimates for EPS this year, the company trades at a forward PE (for the current fiscal year) of 10.81	.
* If INTC	hits the mean estimates for EPS for next year, the company trades at a forward PE (for the next fiscal year) of	10.64	.

But now the narrative is gently changing -- we said gently. Perhaps Intel isn't going to be as far behind as expected in the 7nm market, and perhaps buyers will have more patience.
This earnings release will focus on the numbers, as they always do, but the guidance will be the focus. Intel must answer questions about its lag in the 7nm market and when it will be back, if ever, as the technology leader in the space.
Some questions will persist around its GPU product, but for now, that market is so utterly dominated by Nvidia, it's likely a non starter, even if its good news -- in fact, even it's bad news.

* If INTC reports an EPS number above $ 1.18 , that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC guides revenue above $ 18.96 Billion , that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC guides EPS above $ 1.19 , that would be ahead of even the highest estimates.
* If INTC hits the mean estimates for EPS this year, the company trades at a forward PE (for the current fiscal year) of 10.81 .
* If INTC hits the mean estimates for EPS for next year, the company trades at a forward PE (for the next fiscal year) of 10.64 .

original text:
​​I'm a science journalist and video producer at Scholastic, where I create nonfiction content for students of all ages. In addition, I've written for Wired, The New York Times Upfront, The Daily Beast, Modern Farmer, The Hairpin, and others as a freelance reporter. And, I published 3 kids science chapter books with Scholastic.
​I received my master's degree in science journalism from New York University and my bachelor's degree in English & Psychology from the Johns Hopkins University.
processed_text:
I'm a science journalist and video producer at Scholastic, where I create nonfiction content for students of all ages. In addition, I've written for Wired, The New York Times Upfront, The Daily Beast, Modern Farmer, The Hairpin, and others as a freelance reporter. And, I published 3 kids science chapter books with Scholastic.
 I received my master's degree in science journalism from New York University and my bachelor's degree in English & Psychology from the Johns Hopkins University.

original text:
Combustible dust clouds may not normally be present in the workplace, but may be present inside process vessels, dust collectors, and powder transfer equipment. Ignition sources can be present in the workplace and processing operations such as milling, blending, pneumatic conveying, and drying, and can ignite powders through electrical sparks, friction, and static electricity. These modules are designed to train employees on important concepts regarding identification and remediation of these issues.
Chilworth Global Online Training is convenient and easy to use. Employees learn at their own time and pace. The system automatically tracks progress and quiz scores and bookmarks the learner's place. Upon completion of the course, employees can print a certificate of completion.

Finding the right server can be time-consuming and frustrating, but that doesn't have to happen anymore. If you've been frustrated with your server you need to give Downtownhost a try.
We offer a variety of different tiers for you to choose from, letting you know exactly what you are getting and how much you will pay. There are 4 basic tiers to select, each with their own payment plans. The best thing about having so many different options is that you are able to control how much space you use and how fast your bandwidth is.
•	Access to a help desk 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
However, you still haven't heard the best part of using Downtownhost. What if you learned that you can get all of these same features at a price lower than they already are?
Right now, you can get all the same services and features at 60% off on your first billing. Simply use "17years" as your coupon code, and watch your price drop. That's right, you can save 60% off of your plan by using a coupon.
This means that if you chose a $4.95 per month plan, you'll only pay $1.40 a month! The bigger plan you select, the bigger your savings will be. There is nothing extra that you have to do, just put in "17years" as your coupon code and save 60% instantly! You won't find a price this low with so many features and services anywhere else, especially when you consider the fact that you can get it for 60% cheaper.
If you still need some incentive, you should be aware that there is a 30 day money back guarantee for Shared and Reseller plans. What are you waiting for? Give Downtownhost a try and save 60% with your coupon code today!

original text:
Peter Jackson is the current go-to-guy for sweeping epics including Dwarves, Elves and dragons. The original 'Lord of the Rings' trilogy was entirely successful and brought to life a story a lot of us grew up reading. I thought the Rankin and Bass animations were pretty awesome for what they were, but Jackson's film treatment of the series blew away any of my expectations. Before Jackson began the conversion, I had the poorly carried out vision of a little nightmare of a film called 'Dungeons & Dragons' by director Courtney Solomon, stuck in my head as for what Jackson's films would probably end up looking like. This is one moment where I was beyond thrilled to be wrong. Now someone go back and fix the 'Dungeons & Dragons' movie, please?
I'm ready for, beyond ready, for the finale! Not just is this one of my beloved books I grew up with, but the story, even with its differences, is by far, the best treatment it could get in the industry today and that is thanks to Peter Jackson.
Maybe we can petition him to fix 'Dungeons & Dragons' after this!
This entry was posted on Saturday, April 26th, 2014 at 9:16 am	and is filed under Books, Events, Film, News. You can follow any responses to this entry through the RSS 2.0 feed. You can skip to the end and leave a response. Pinging is currently not allowed.
" Josh Gad Teaming Up With Disney Again!!!

original text:
The Communication of a company is expressed not only through its marketing, but also and above all, through its visual communication. For this reason the contribution of the graphic designer is crucial in research and the creation of a custom identity, consistent, easily identifiable, unifying and revealing of the values ​​of the company. A strong visual sense that is appropriately targeted leads your brand to be clearly identified and stored in memory.
Myriam Cohen Studio is a graphic design agency based in Jerusalem. Listening to your desires, your needs and your beliefs, we anticipate your desires, sometimes overturning your codes, and innovate while respecting the values ​​that represent your brand.
We assist your company in all your creative projects, the outline of a first visual identity, such as the establishment of a marketing launch or the revitalization your brand. Our areas of expertise range from packaging for all types of products and logos, through posters, presentation brochures, new commercial space, and other media related to visual communication of a company that is dynamic and looking to the future.
We propose a custom tailored creation to your brand or your business, constant monitoring of projects, and constant availability. We take care of your communication and from its conception to its realization.
Powered by the highest professionalism, Myriam Cohen Studio brings concrete results for its achievements and supports its clients in a relationship based on trust and efficiency.
תבליט את המותג שלך "
Myriam Cohen studied Graphic Arts in Paris in 1996 at the prestigious ESAG - Penninghen (Higher School of Graphic Arts) and then continued her studies by specializing in visual communication at the Ecole d'Art Maryse Eloy (newly renamed "Paris School of Visual Arts") where graduated in 2000. She has worked in the largest agencies in Paris as a freelance before joining the department cosmetic Hotshop agency that specializes in packaging.
Since 2005, Myriam moved to Israel where she worked for larger agencies (Neogroup, Adlai & Partners, and Adler Brands of the advertising group Grey Israel), absorbing the language, culture, and local graphics.
In 2008, Myriam Cohen decided to create his own graphic design studio that enables her to express her own creativity, enriched by her many experiences to provide a work conceived in the utmost care, with the finest attention to detail and concern for the highest quality.
